function.name: ETGO_GET_LOCATION
function.body:
v_location character varying; BEGIN select ad_column_identifier_std('c_location', bploc.c_location_id) into v_location from c_bpartner_location bploc where bploc.c_bpartner_id = p_bpartner_id and bploc.isactive = 'Y' order by case when bploc.isbillto = 'Y' then 1 when bploc.isshipto = 'Y' then 2 else 3 end, bploc.created desc limit 1;
return v_location; END ETGO_GET_LOCATION
